title: Chouchou Refuses to Abandon the Shop
description: On pages 5–8, Chouchou’s loyalty to the pet food shop turns Buggy’s occupation from a pirate threat into a personal wound for the town.
scene: Chouchou refuses to give up the place connected to his owner, while pirates and bystanders react to the dog’s stubborn defense.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: It's his business if he moves or not.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Our business is to get you out of there.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: DUMB DOG! Lemme go, Lemme go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look at you two. Not to criticize, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Is the middle of the street really the best hiding place you could come up with?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I just wanted to thank you for saving me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You stole the key to the cage!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I GOT THE STUPID KEY, BUT I LEFT THE MAP AND ALL THE TREASURE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is great! I thought I'd never get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: THEN THE RESCUE... WAS A SUCCESS... AFTERALL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's not food!! Gimme that key!!

summary: This part makes the conflict emotional: Luffy sees that Buggy’s violence is not abstract, but aimed at things people love and protect.
